creator: ulassayginim@gmail.com
text:
on Freebsd 12.1 , i tried to install by selecting only CFG option.
but it failed to install and give error.

i also tested other options, these also give same error.

you may also look this url to get more info.

https://github.com/ptrrkssn/nss_ndb/issues/4
